role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed crop types (maize) and tree species.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road surface and utility infrastructure.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues like camera generation and pole style.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the United States. The agents provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence (maize stubble, wooden poles) that effectively distinguished the US from the closest competitor (Canada) and eliminated others (Ukraine, Argentina) through specific infrastructural and botanical cues.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of rolling hills, gravel road, and autumn colors match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified maize stubble and deciduous trees.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described the wooden pole and gravel road.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately described the pole style and image quality.
